name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: At 448 Moreland Ave NE in Atlanta, GA, SAM Check Cashing Machine provides fast check cashing services for Eastside residents and workers.
description_long:
SAM Check Cashing Machine is located at 448 Moreland Ave NE on Atlanta's Eastside, serving the Virginia-Highland and surrounding neighborhoods. This standalone check-cashing facility sits in a convenient location near downtown Atlanta with accessible parking. Hours and holiday schedules are not currently published online, so calling ahead at +1 404-522-5600 before your visit is recommended.

This Atlanta location specializes in check cashing, offering competitive rates for personal checks, payroll checks, government checks, and business checks. The staff at the 448 Moreland Ave NE branch are available to answer questions about ID requirements, accepted check types, and current rates. Contact the Atlanta store directly at +1 404-522-5600 for specific details about your check-cashing needs.

If you need same-day cash in Atlanta, GA, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check to 448 Moreland Ave NE. This location serves Atlanta-area residents and workers who prefer fast, direct check cashing without requiring a bank account.
pros: Consistently high customer satisfaction with 5.0-star rating across all available reviews
Convenient in-building location at 1270 W Peachtree St NW, accessible within a commercial building
Extended weekday hours (9:00 AM opening) accommodates working customers who receive paychecks
Multiple branch locations in Atlanta area including 448 Moreland Ave NE location
Quick service focused specifically on check cashing with no extraneous product upselling
Owner actively responds to customer reviews, indicating engaged management
Located in central Atlanta (Midtown area) with nearby banking alternatives for comparison shopping
cons: Website does not disclose check cashing fees or percentage rates, making cost comparison impossible
No information about check limits, maximum amounts, or restrictions on check types
Limited service scope—check cashing only, no additional financial products or services offered
No details on identification requirements, processing times, or account verification procedures
Closed weekends and Saturdays, limiting accessibility for customers on non-traditional schedules
best_for: Atlanta-area employees receiving regular paychecks who prefer immediate cash access
Workers without bank accounts seeking convenient, centralized check conversion services
Professionals in the Midtown Atlanta area who value proximity and quick transactions
diagnosis: SAM Check Cashing Machine is best for Atlanta-area residents and workers who need quick, convenient check-to-cash conversion without a bank account, particularly those working near the Midtown location or Moreland Ave branch. The main caveat is the complete lack of fee transparency and service term details on their website, which prevents consumers from comparing this service's actual cost against banks, credit unions, or competing check cashing providers.
meta_description: SAM Check Cashing Machine at 448 Moreland Ave NE, Atlanta, GA. Fast check cashing services on Atlanta's Eastside.
